arts.ttl: Arsenal suffer huge injury blow one week before Real Madrid Champions League clash
arts.sum: Arsenal's talismanic centre-back Gabriel Magalhaes lasted a little more than 15 minutes before sinking to the turf against Fulham on Tuesday evening.

arts.ttl: Arsenal suffer major injury blow as first-team star limps off minutes into Fulham clash - just a week before Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: Arsenal injury woes worsened on Tuesday as a crucial first-team star was forced to limp off just 16 minutes into their Premier League clash against Fulham at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Arsenal star Gabriel forced off injured just one week before Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: The Gunners defender limped off in the 16th minute of the match against Fulham on Tuesday evening seven days before his side take on Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney backs Liverpool star to join Real Madrid
arts.sum: Former Manchester United and England star Wayne Rooney has thrown his backing behind Liverpool star Trent Alexander-Arnold’s long-touted move to Real Madrid. The name of defender Alexander-Arnold has of course…

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Madrid vs Real Sociedad, 2025 Copa del Rey
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Real Sociedad in the return leg of the Copa del Rey Semifinals. HOW TO WATCH, STREAM COPA DEL REY

arts.ttl: Official: Kylian Mbappé drops out as Real Madrid name XI to face Real Sociedad
arts.sum: La Liga heavyweights Real Madrid have on Tuesday evening unveiled the club’s latest starting line-up. Real are of course primed to return to action in short order, in a showdown…

arts.ttl: Man United boss Amorim responds to Bruno Fernandes’ Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has this week spoken out on the speculation linking star midfielder Bruno Fernandes with a move to Spain. The name of Portuguese international Fernandes…

arts.ttl: Iraola 'loving life' at Bournemouth amid Real Madrid and Spurs talk
arts.sum: On June 19 2023, a relatively unknown Spanish manager became the first foreign boss of AFC Bournemouth. Fast forward 652 days and that man isn't unknown anymore. In fact, he's so well known right now - he's one of the hottest prospects in the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid make move to rival Arsenal for £50m midfielder
arts.sum: Arsenal are determined to sign Martin Zubimendi this summer, but completing a deal looks like it could be difficult because of Real Madrid, who are also eyeing the transfer of the 26-year-old Real Sociedad and Spain star. arts.ttl: What are the charges against Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti?
arts.sum: Legendary football Italian manager could face years in prison if prosecutors get their way
